customManagers.description: Track the mkdocs-material pin in the Pages workflow (a pip install line, not a requirements file). GitHub Actions versions are tracked natively by the github-actions manager.

packageRules.description: Major bumps wait for an explicit tick on the Dependency Dashboard — a deliberate, reviewed act (mkdocs-material 2.x / MkDocs 2.0 is a breaking rewrite), not a Monday-morning automerge.
